"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import Link from "next/link"; import Image from "next/image"; // Placeholder for actual Cart context data fetching const DEMO_CART_ITEMS = [ { id: "1", name: "Pure Honey - 500g", price: 449.00, quantity: 2, image: "/images/500g/1.png" } ]; export default function CartPage() { const [items, setItems] = useState(DEMO_CART_ITEMS); const subtotal = items.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.price * item.quantity), 0); const shipping = subtotal > 500 ? 0 : 50; const total = subtotal + shipping; return (

Your Cart

{items.length === 0 ? (

Your cart is currently empty.

Continue Shopping
) : (
{/* Cart Items List */}
{items.map((item) => (

{item.name}

Γé╣{item.price.toFixed(2)}

{item.quantity}

Γé╣{(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}

))}
{/* Order Summary Checkout Block */}

Order Summary

Subtotal Γé╣{subtotal.toFixed(2)}
Shipping {shipping === 0 ? "Free" : `Γé╣${shipping.toFixed(2)}`}
Total Γé╣{total.toFixed(2)}
Proceed to Checkout

Taxes included. Discounts applied at checkout.

)}
); }

source:
import { Metadata } from "next"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Our Legacy ΓÇö Krishna Naturals", description: "The story of Krishna Naturals. Over 45 years of purity and trust.", }; export default function LegacyPage() { return (

Our Heritage

The Krishna Legacy

A journey of purity from 1977 to today.

In 1977, Mr. Tarachandbhai Bhanushali embarked on a mission with a singular vision: to deliver completely pure, unadulterated natural products to households across India.

He believed that "Assurity"ΓÇöthe absolute guarantee of quality and purityΓÇöwas the most valuable asset a business could hold. From a small operation in Gujarat, this belief laid the bedrock for what Krishna Naturals is today. Every drop of honey we produce is a testament to this foundational promise.

The Wholesale Era

As the years passed, the baton was handed to Mr. Naresh Bhanushali. With a keen eye for scale and operations, he revolutionized our business model by introducing a robust Wholesale division. Under his leadership, Krishna Naturals scaled spectacularly, processing and distributing over 50 tonnes of honey. We became a silent giant in the bulk market, trusted by massive distributors and brands relying on our unwavering standard of purity.

Mastering Quality

Scaling to such volumes required impeccable quality control. Enter Mr. Vishal Gajra, who took the helm of Operations and Quality Assurance. In an industry rampant with adulteration, Vishal implemented strict testing and sourcing protocols. He ensured that whether we were packaging 250 grams or 250 kilograms, the source remained 100% natural, raw, and organic forest honey.

The Modern D2C Chapter

Today, Krishna Naturals enters a new era. Mr. Veer Bhanushali is bridging the gap between our rich heritage and modern technology. Realizing that the pure, wholesale-grade honey we were supplying to the market was often diluted by middlemen, Veer spearheaded the Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) movement for Krishna Naturals.

Now, the exact same uncompromised, forest-sourced honey that built our 45-year legacy is available directly to your doorstep. No middlemen. No adulteration. Just pure love, from our family to yours.

); }

source:
import { Metadata } from "next"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Privacy Policy ΓÇö Krishna Naturals", description: "Our privacy policy and how we protect your data.", }; export default function PrivacyPolicyPage() { return (

Privacy Policy

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}

1. Introduction

Welcome to Krishna Naturals. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website (regardless of where you visit it from) and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

2. The Data We Collect

We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:

  • Identity Data: includes first name, last name, username or similar identifier.
  • Contact Data: includes billing address, delivery address, email address and telephone numbers.
  • Financial Data: includes payment card details (processed securely via our payment partners).
  • Transaction Data: includes details about payments to and from you and other details of products you have purchased from us.
  • Profile Data: includes your username and password, purchases or orders made by you, your interests, preferences, feedback and survey responses.

3. How We Use Your Data

We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:

  • Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you (e.g., fulfilling an order).
  • To manage our relationship with you, including notifying you about changes to our terms or privacy policy.
  • Where it is necessary for our legitimate interests (or those of a third party) and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests.

4. Data Security

We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorised way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know.

5. Third-Party Links

This website may include links to third-party websites, plug-ins and applications. Clicking on those links or enabling those connections may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.

6. Google OAuth & Authentication

In order to provide seamless and secure login experiences, Krishna Naturals utilizes Google Authentication (OAuth). When you choose to "Continue with Google", we receive your basic profile information (such as your name and email address) solely for the purpose of creating and maintaining your user account on our platform. We do not access your Google contacts, drive, or any other private information.

7. Contact Details

If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

Krishna Naturals
Gujarat, India
Email: info@krishnanaturals.co.in

); }

source:
import { Metadata } from "next"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Terms of Service ΓÇö Krishna Naturals", description: "Terms and conditions for using our website and services.", }; export default function TermsPage() { return (

Terms of Service

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}

1. Terms

By accessing the website at https://krishnanaturals.co.in, you are agreeing to be bound by these terms of service, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws.

2. Use License

Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Krishna Naturals' website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.

3. Products and Pricing

All products listed on the website are subject to availability. We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time. Prices for our products are subject to change without notice. We shall not be liable to you or to any third-party for any modification, price change, suspension or discontinuance of the Service.

4. Accuracy of Materials

The materials appearing on Krishna Naturals' website could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Krishna Naturals does not warrant that any of the materials on its website are accurate, complete or current. Krishna Naturals may make changes to the materials contained on its website at any time without notice.

5. Links

Krishna Naturals has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its website and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by Krishna Naturals of the site. Use of any such linked website is at the user's own risk.

6. Governing Law

These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that State or location.

); }
